title: callista mutabilis
intro: Callista mutabilis, also known as the changing calla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin conditions and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Callista mutabilis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and reduce the severity of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
